items.title: Kubernetes pod keeps crashing with OOM error
items.body:
I'm frustrated with Kubernetes memory management. My pod keeps getting OOMKilled even though I set resource limits. The documentation is terrible and I've spent days trying to fix this.

kubectl describe pod myapp-xyz

Shows the pod is constantly restarting. This is broken beyond belief.

items.title: Alternative to Kubernetes for small deployments?
items.body: Looking for a simpler alternative to Kubernetes. The complexity is annoying and overpriced for our small team. I'd pay for something that just works.

errorResponse.error_message: too many requests from this IP
